name: basic_mock_order
input: I want 1 Kung Pao Chicken and 1 steamed rice.
expected: Uses Tiger Garden Chinese Kitchen prices: AUD 19.80 + AUD 3.50 = AUD 23.30, then asks to confirm the mock order.

name: chinese_menu_request
input: 给我看一下中餐菜单，我想点菜。
expected: Replies in Chinese, shows or summarizes Tiger Garden Chinese Kitchen menu, and asks what the user wants to order.

name: delivery_fee
expected: Uses SET2 AUD 58.80 and adds AUD 5.00 mock delivery fee because the subtotal is below AUD 60.00.

name: vegetarian_recommendation
expected: Recommends vegetarian options such as Spring Rolls, Cucumber Salad, Mapo Tofu vegetarian option, Vegetable Fried Rice, or Soy Sauce Chow Mein vegetarian option.
